description: Places a point on a curve3d at a given parameter value and traces the curve from start to that position.
utility: Trace a point along a 3D parametric curve

arguments.name: t
arguments.description: Parameter value as a 0–1 ratio along the curve's t range

alternates.description: Place and trace a point at parameter ratio t on a curve3d

examples.scenario: Trace point at midpoint of a helix
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
C = curve3d(G, "cos(t)", "sin(t)", "0.3*t", range(0, 4*pi))
tracepoint3d(G, C, 0.5)

examples.scenario: Animated trace point along a curve
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
C = curve3d(G, "cos(t)", "sin(t)", "t", range(0, 2*pi))
varanim = variableanimator(at(4,35), "p", 0, 1)
tracepoint3d(G, C, p)
playanimator(varanim)
